chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-938 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 22.10.2025 Mr. Azhar Ahmed Khan, Advocate along with petitioner Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General along with SI Syed Adnan Shah NCCIA Karachi ************** SI Syed Adanan Shah is present and submits that the petitioner is not co-operating in Inquiry No.2657/2025 pending before the FIA Cyber Crime Reporting Centre, Karachi. Therefore, it is contended that she is not entitled to the relief as claimed by her through the present petition. It appears from the record that the petitioner is not co-operating with the inquiry agency, she is hereby directed to join the inquiry proceedings without further delay. However, the respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law and ensure that no undue harassment is caused to the petitioner during the course of the inquiry. In view of the above, present petition stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
